messages.content:
Your job is to check if the given section appears or starts in the given page_text.

    Note: do fuzzy matching, ignore any space inconsistency in the page_text.

    The given section title is 2025年Android端广告主占比接近80%，中重度产品iOS端广告主占比在35%左右.
    The given page_text is 12
中重产品 iOS端占比都在 35%左右
轻度产品 Android 端广告主占比超 81%手游广告主各系统占比
19.0%35.3% 35.6%81.0%64.7% 64.4%
轻度 中度 重度FB系渠道 iOS端广告主占比在 21%左右
X（原Twitter ）iOS端广告主占比最高为 46.6%热门渠道各系统广告主占比
21.2% 21.6%13.1% 15.4%32.6% 31.9%
18.2%46.6%78.8% 78.4%86.9% 84.6%67.4% 68.1%
81.8%53.4%2025年Android 端广告主占比接近 80%，中重度产品 iOS端广告主占比在 35%左右2025年 全球手游 各系统广告主观察
Source ：广大大，根据后台抓取后数据整理后展现
Date Range ：2025/1~2025/12iOS
20.4%
Android
79.6%各系统手游广告主占比
.

    Reply format:
    {

        "answer": "yes or no" (yes if the section appears or starts in the page_text, no otherwise)
    }
    Directly return the final JSON structure. Do not output anything else.

Do not include any thinking field, explanation, or reasoning. Return only the final requested JSON or text.
